title: Who is Nishanth?
content: Nishanth Manoharan is a Data Analytics Engineering graduate student at Northeastern University with experience in generative AI, RAG systems, data engineering, analytics, and machine learning.

title: What is his current role?
content: His current role is Generative AI Engineer Co-op at Exact Sciences in Madison, Wisconsin.

title: What does he do at Exact Sciences?
content: At Exact Sciences, Nishanth works on retrieval benchmarking, reranker and embedding evaluation, enterprise RAG evaluation design, synthetic knowledge base generation, and LLM evaluation for hallucination and PII risk.

title: What is his RAG experience?
content: His RAG experience includes retrieval benchmarking, reranker evaluation, embedding comparisons, enterprise retrieval evaluation, LangChain-based assistants, Chroma and FAISS usage, Microsoft Fabric integrations, and project work on agentic and multimodal chatbots.

title: What projects has he built?
content: He has built projects including an Autonomous Agentic Wealth Management Chatbot, a Multimodal RAG-Based Food Recommendation System, a Conversational EDA Chatbot, an Intelligent Financial Reporting Agent, and multiple data engineering pipelines.

title: What tools does he use?
content: His stack includes Python, SQL, PySpark, LangChain, LlamaIndex, FAISS, Chroma, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, Tableau, Power BI, AWS, Azure, Databricks, Docker, and Microsoft Fabric.

title: What is his education background?
content: He is pursuing a Master of Science in Data Analytics Engineering at Northeastern University and completed a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science at SRM Institute of Science and Technology.
